ns0:entry.ns0:title: Eugeny/tabby
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Eugeny/tabby
Language: typescript
A terminal for a more modern age

ns0:entry.ns0:title: InsForge/InsForge
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/InsForge/InsForge
Language: typescript
InsForge is a Postgres-based backend with auth, storage, compute, hosting, and AI gateway. Built for coding agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: actions/checkout
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/actions/checkout
Language: typescript
Action for checking out a repo

ns0:entry.ns0:title: directus/directus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/directus/directus
Language: typescript
The flexible backend for all your projects 🐰 Turn your DB into a headless CMS, admin panels, or apps with a custom UI, instant APIs, auth & more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: koala73/worldmonitor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/koala73/worldmonitor
Language: typescript
Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laurent22/joplin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laurent22/joplin
Language: typescript
Joplin - the privacy-focused note taking app with sync capabilities for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android and iOS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/TypeScript
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/TypeScript
Language: typescript
TypeScript is a superset of JavaScript that compiles to clean JavaScript output.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mksglu/context-mode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mksglu/context-mode
Language: typescript
Context window optimization for AI coding agents. Sandboxes tool output, 98% reduction. 14 platforms

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nestjs/nest
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nestjs/nest
Language: typescript
A progressive Node.js framework for building efficient, scalable, and enterprise-grade server-side applications with TypeScript/JavaScript 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: payloadcms/payload
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/payloadcms/payload
Language: typescript
Payload is the open-source, fullstack Next.js framework, giving you instant backend superpowers. Get a full TypeScript backend and admin panel instantly. Use Payload as a headless CMS or for building powerful applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/ruflo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/ruflo
Language: typescript
🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, self-learning swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vercel-labs/open-agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vercel-labs/open-agents
Language: typescript
An open source template for building cloud agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: virattt/dexter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/virattt/dexter
Language: typescript
An autonomous agent for deep financial research
